reasoning: Koren, we are targeting your lactate clearance limiter. Your last ride showed a lower intensity focus; now it's time to build the power you'll need for the Alpine Loop's main climb. Improving your fatigue resistance will help you sustain target power output.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 min intervals with 5 min at 201-218W, followed by 7 min at 242-256W. Rest 3 min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
